Petition To Remove Trust From Court Supervision
Off Calendar Jul-13-2010 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Preliminary Distribution Of Specific Bequest.
Off Calendar Jan-11-2010 Advanced From Mar-08-10 To Jan-25-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Mar-01-2010 Continued To Jun-28-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch for Debra Dolch.

Ms. Rasch stated that there was one remaining issue to do with the commmercial property in Los Angeles, that the beneficiaries were trying to decide what to do with the property, and that she estimated they would need a four month continuance. The Court continued the matter to June 28, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

Petition For Preliminary Distribution Of Specific Bequest.
Off Calendar Jan-25-2010 Granted Per Written Order
